name: Aputure Spotlight Mini Zoom
description: Designed for the LS 60d and 60x LED lights, this Spotlight Mini Zoom from Aputure is a 2X optical projection lens.

features.Key Features:: 2X Optical Projection Lens | Adjustable 15 to 30° Beam Angle | Built-In Shutters | Drop-In Iris | Accepts M-Size Gobos | Rosette-Style Locking Yoke
features.What's in The Box?: Aputure Spotlight Mini Zoom for LS 60d and 60x LED Lights | 15 x M-Size Gobo | Gobo Holder | Iris | Carrying Case
